string.text: Children of the underground: talk to Borland
You should speak with Borland.
Children of the underground: follow Borland
Follow your partner and cover him.
Children of the underground: kill the mutant
Borland is attacked by a controller. Kill the creature before it destroys his brain.
Children of the underground: talk to Borland
Ask Borland about his health.
Children of the underground: follow Borland
Follow your partner and cover him.
Children of the underground: talk to your partner
Borland found the elevator, talk to him about what to do next.
Children of the underground: find the electrical box and return power
You need to go further into the laboratory and find the circuit breaker for the power supply.
Children of the underground: find a way to reach the lower level
You need to get to the lower floors of the laboratory. You may have to find a way to break open one of the doors.
Children of the underground: make your way to the control room
Get to the lowest level.
Children of the underground: talk to Borland
Find out what's going on.
Children of the underground: kill the ambushers.
Eliminate the Monolith squad who occupies the hall and the inner rooms.
Children of the underground: find a way out
Proceed and find your way out of the lab.
Children of the underground: find the main electric box
Locate the main breaker for the power supply.
Children of the underground: find the extra electrical box
Locate the auxiliary circuit breaker for the power supply.
Sidorovich's task: find the documents
Grab every document you can find in the lab.
Sidorovich's task: wait for instructions
Wait for Sidorovich to call you.
Sidorovich's task: give the documents to Barkeep
Give the found documents to Barkeep.
